title: Dogfood Pass 0018 Quantum Strict Canonicalization Adapters

claims.text: Pass 0018 created a QuantumStrictCanonicalizationAdapterSet/v1 artifact with status STRICT_ADAPTER_MATCH, five adapter profiles, nine negative fixtures, eight source anchors, and seal 0727efc532db5c9c759bec5319d0ab547942129880d20823764cba12edd007fd.
claims.falsification: schemas/quantum-strict-canonicalization-adapters-pass-0018.json is missing, is not QuantumStrictCanonicalizationAdapterSet/v1, reports non-MATCH status, has fewer than five adapters, fewer than nine negative fixtures, fewer than eight source anchors, or lacks the expected seal

claims.text: Pass 0018 defines StrictQuantumCanonicalizationPolicy/v1 requiring duplicate JSON key detection, binary payload media type and content hash, object-storage content hash, floating-point precision policy, and policy hash a54c16072736fa63bece139a42caf3265931553087cbca8738058ad7dbd57e62.
claims.falsification: the strict policy is missing, has a different schema, omits any required policy, or lacks the expected policy hash

claims.text: Pass 0018 defines layout adapters for Qiskit, Amazon Braket, Cirq, PennyLane, and QIR.
claims.falsification: any of layout-adapter-qiskit, layout-adapter-amazon-braket, layout-adapter-cirq, layout-adapter-pennylane, or layout-adapter-qir is missing

claims.text: Each pass 0018 adapter is a QuantumRegisterLayoutAdapter/v1 with HTTPS source anchor, required receipt fields, adapter status, and adapter hash.
claims.falsification: any adapter has the wrong schema, lacks HTTPS source, lacks required receipt fields, lacks adapter status, or lacks adapter hash

claims.text: Pass 0018 defines QuantumPostProcessingOperation/v1 baseline with input hash, output hash, parameter hash, operation hash, and deterministic=true.
claims.falsification: the post-processing operation is missing, has a different schema, omits any required hash, or is not deterministic

claims.text: Pass 0018 negative fixtures reject duplicate JSON keys, binary-as-JSON parsing, object-storage URI without content hash, float result without precision policy, mismatched framework adapter, Cirq histogram without fold_func, PennyLane counts without wire order, QIR result without record map, and post-processing without hashes.
claims.falsification: any of the nine expected negative fixture ids is missing or has expected_validator_status other than REJECT

claims.text: Pass 0018 validator reports MATCH with one matched check and zero drift.
claims.falsification: schemas/pass-0018-strict-canonicalization-adapter-validator-result.json is missing, reports non-MATCH status, does not report match=1, or reports drift above zero

claims.text: Pass 0018 records tool receipts showing Index, Gather, Telos, Forum, and Crucible status MATCH while preserving Forum submit as UNVERIFIABLE due to executor JSON parsing.
claims.falsification: schemas/tool-receipts-pass-0018.json is missing, lacks any required tool status, or treats Forum submit as successful rather than UNVERIFIABLE

claims.text: Pass 0018 promotes zero quantum jobs, quantum hardware results, quantum advantage claims, theorem proofs, natural laws, or scientific discoveries.
claims.falsification: any pass 0018 artifact labels a new quantum job, hardware result, quantum advantage claim, theorem proof, natural law, or scientific discovery as promoted
